/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/test_lmutil_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/test_virtual_license.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/test_config_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/test_config_diff.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/test_config_reloader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/test_framing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/test_protocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/test_thread_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/test_metrics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/test_alerter.cpp.o -o unit_tests  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a ../../src/pool/libpool_lib.a ../../src/broker/libbroker_lib.a ../../src/api/libapi_lib.a ../../src/common/libcommon_lib.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a ../../src/pool/libpool_lib.a ../../src/tracker/libtracker_lib.a ../../src/common/libcommon_lib.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.12.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.9.1.0 -lpq -lcpp-httplib
